description: The Continue button on the price step in the onboarding wizard does not advance to the next page. Clicking it shows no error in the UI but the console logs a TypeError about a missing onAdvance handler.
reproSteps:
1. Sign in as a school admin
2. Open /onboarding/{schoolId}/price
3. Fill in the price and click Continue
expected: Wizard advances to the next step (Plan)
actual: Page does not advance; console error TypeError onAdvance is not a function
_expected: verified-report (assuming triage classifies as bug + clear repro)
